records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka... What are you doing up...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: I just woke up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are you okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I'm fine...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I'm fine...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I'm fine...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sasha, I have something to tell you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sasha, I have something to tell you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Oh... I see...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Oh... I see...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Oh... I see...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>So the Kikimora we defeated that time was...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>So the Kikimora we defeated that time was...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>So the Kikimora we defeated that time was...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I think it was me.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I think it was me.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I think it was me.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>When the Kikimora died, I felt at ease like I was falling asleep.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>When the Kikimora died, I felt at ease like I was falling asleep.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>When the Kikimora died, I felt at ease like I was falling asleep.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I think it was wandering around only looking for me.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I think it was wandering around only looking for me.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I think it was wandering around only looking for me.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>So that it could die with me.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>So that it could die with me.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>So that it could die with me.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Haha... What a comical life...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Haha... What a comical life...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Haha... What a comical life...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Mavka...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Mavka...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Mavka...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I also have something I want to tell you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I also have something I want to tell you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I also have something I want to tell you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well...

Actually, I
8g!

Actually, I

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...just wanted to tell you to cheer up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...just wanted to tell you to cheer up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...just wanted to tell you to cheer up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cheer up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cheer up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cheer up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I always smiled my way through hardship...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I always smiled my way through hardship...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I always smiled my way through hardship...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it's the only thing I know to do...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it's the only thing I know to do...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it's the only thing I know to do...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, I just wanted to comfort you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, I just wanted to comfort you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, I just wanted to comfort you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah ha ha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah ha ha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah ha ha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You idiot. I can never be mad at you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You idiot. I can never be mad at you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You idiot. I can never be mad at you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know what you just told me was from your heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know what you just told me was from your heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know what you just told me was from your heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, I'm a little relieved... to hear you being you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, I'm a little relieved... to hear you being you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, I'm a little relieved... to hear you being you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, thanks, Sasha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, thanks, Sasha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, thanks, Sasha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For sticking around ever since we first met.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For sticking around ever since we first met.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For sticking around ever since we first met.

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... Mavka!
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... Mavka!
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... Mavka!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I... want to say thank you to you, too...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I... want to say thank you to you, too...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I... want to say thank you to you, too...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: For being with me all this time, and watching the Town Soldiers of Bremen with me, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: For being with me all this time, and watching the Town Soldiers of Bremen with me, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: For being with me all this time, and watching the Town Soldiers of Bremen with me, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't have to say more. It's making me blush.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't have to say more. It's making me blush.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't have to say more. It's making me blush.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey... Can I sleep with you tonight?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey... Can I sleep with you tonight?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey... Can I sleep with you tonight?

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure! That's a great idea!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure! That's a great idea!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure! That's a great idea!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... don't push me away while you talk in your sleep, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... don't push me away while you talk in your sleep, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... don't push me away while you talk in your sleep, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The village people don't seem to be coming out of their houses these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The village people don't seem to be coming out of their houses these days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The village people don't seem to be coming out of their houses these days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think the atmosphere got worse after the Northern Army arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think the atmosphere got worse after the Northern Army arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think the atmosphere got worse after the Northern Army arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're taking tons of Eternium as payment for their protection against the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're taking tons of Eternium as payment for their protection against the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're taking tons of Eternium as payment for their protection against the Counterside Effect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though we're not seeing any C.O.s since...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though we're not seeing any C.O.s since...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though we're not seeing any C.O.s since...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think they're actually here to protect the village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think they're actually here to protect the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think they're actually here to protect the village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka, let's lay low for the time being.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka, let's lay low for the time being.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka, let's lay low for the time being.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They'll leave once the Counterside Effect has been resolved. So, let's wait until then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They'll leave once the Counterside Effect has been resolved. So, let's wait until then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They'll leave once the Counterside Effect has been resolved. So, let's wait until then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ehehe... But there's no need for you to keep holding my hand like this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ehehe... But there's no need for you to keep holding my hand like this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ehehe... But there's no need for you to keep holding my hand like this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, there is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, there is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, there is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, I'm begging you. I'll even give you double the money...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, I'm begging you. I'll even give you double the money...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, I'm begging you. I'll even give you double the money...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That girl's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That girl's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That girl's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you came here to investigate, not because you're hungry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you came here to investigate, not because you're hungry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you came here to investigate, not because you're hungry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think I'm stupid enough to believe that you're investigating how poor we are?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think I'm stupid enough to believe that you're investigating how poor we are?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think I'm stupid enough to believe that you're investigating how poor we are?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but there's no bread here for you! So, get lost!

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but there's no bread here for you! So, get lost!

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but...! Then Dreka will be upset...
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but...! Then Dreka will be upset...
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but...! Then Dreka will be upset...

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what should I do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what should I do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, ma'am.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, it's you, Sasha. Is there anything you need?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, it's you, Sasha. Is there anything you need?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I'll just take this for today...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I'll just take this for today...

records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am, can I also take this too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. You're buying that to give to that child, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. You're buying that to give to that child, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. You're buying that to give to that child, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No way! I'm just here to buy stuff for myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way! I'm just here to buy stuff for myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way! I'm just here to buy stuff for myself.

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right. Here you go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right. Here you go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha, I think she's following us...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha, I think she's following us...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha, I think she's following us...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh? Me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh? Me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh? Me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-Um... Errr... H-hi?
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-Um... Errr... H-hi?
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-Um... Errr... H-hi?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just this once. Here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just this once. Here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just this once. Here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Y-you're really giving it to me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Y-you're really giving it to me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Y-you're really giving it to me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just don't tell the bakery owner because I feel bad for lying to her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just don't tell the bakery owner because I feel bad for lying to her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just don't tell the bakery owner because I feel bad for lying to her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay! Th-thanks!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay! Th-thanks!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay! Th-thanks!

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-let's see... bread, comic books, a cooking book, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-let's see... bread, comic books, a cooking book, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-let's see... bread, comic books, a cooking book, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Perfect, it's all there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Perfect, it's all there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Perfect, it's all there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ehehe... I won't get hit today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ehehe... I won't get hit today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ehehe... I won't get hit today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're Eva, right? Why are you looking for that stuff?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're Eva, right? Why are you looking for that stuff?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're Eva, right? Why are you looking for that stuff?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-well... Dreka told me to buy them...
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-well... Dreka told me to buy them...
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-well... Dreka told me to buy them...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't she buy them herself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't she buy them herself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't she buy them herself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... Dreka can't go out without permission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... Dreka can't go out without permission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... Dreka can't go out without permission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I'm trying to get her some of the hobbies she used to enjoy long ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I'm trying to get her some of the hobbies she used to enjoy long ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I'm trying to get her some of the hobbies she used to enjoy long ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a pie Dreka made. Would you like to try it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a pie Dreka made. Would you like to try it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a pie Dreka made. Would you like to try it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You two are able to eat food?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two are able to eat food?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two are able to eat food?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not really... But she made it, and I feel bad to waste it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not really... But she made it, and I feel bad to waste it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not really... But she made it, and I feel bad to waste it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I have to go through a thorough cleaning of my insides after eating it, if it makes Dreka happy, then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I have to go through a thorough cleaning of my insides after eating it, if it makes Dreka happy, then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I have to go through a thorough cleaning of my insides after eating it, if it makes Dreka happy, then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eww... This tastes horrible...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eww... This tastes horrible...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eww... This tastes horrible...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... She's still learning and hasn't gotten the seasoning right...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... She's still learning and hasn't gotten the seasoning right...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... She's still learning and hasn't gotten the seasoning right...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's okay with you, can I have it back? Dreka likes to see me eat it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's okay with you, can I have it back? Dreka likes to see me eat it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's okay with you, can I have it back? Dreka likes to see me eat it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you the oldest? How can you be so spineless?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you the oldest? How can you be so spineless?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you the oldest? How can you be so spineless?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-am I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-am I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-am I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but... Dreka's not a bad kid as you may think...
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but... Dreka's not a bad kid as you may think...
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but... Dreka's not a bad kid as you may think...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's just strict on me so that I don't make mistakes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's just strict on me so that I don't make mistakes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's just strict on me so that I don't make mistakes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm sure it hurts her, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sure it hurts her, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sure it hurts her, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Last time in the lab, she hit me for stopping her from going on a rampage with the new weapon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Last time in the lab, she hit me for stopping her from going on a rampage with the new weapon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Last time in the lab, she hit me for stopping her from going on a rampage with the new weapon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... I think anyone would get mad for interrupting you while handling a dangerous weapon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... I think anyone would get mad for interrupting you while handling a dangerous weapon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... I think anyone would get mad for interrupting you while handling a dangerous weapon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not at all...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not at all...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not at all...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are not allowed to enter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are not allowed to enter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are not allowed to enter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be out as soon as I find my daughter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be out as soon as I find my daughter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be out as soon as I find my daughter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can't go in, then why don't you get her for me?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can't go in, then why don't you get her for me?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can't go in, then why don't you get her for me?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't she... the mother of the kid who played pretend hero?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't she... the mother of the kid who played pretend hero?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't she... the mother of the kid who played pretend hero?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am? What's wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My daughter said she wanted to see the Northern Army and ran straight in there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My daughter said she wanted to see the Northern Army and ran straight in there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My daughter said she wanted to see the Northern Army and ran straight in there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this jerk won't budge and let me go get her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this jerk won't budge and let me go get her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this jerk won't budge and let me go get her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One is a Doll, and the other is probably...
records.m_Talk_DEU: One is a Doll, and the other is probably...
records.m_Talk_FRA: One is a Doll, and the other is probably...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing will change, no matter how many people complain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing will change, no matter how many people complain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing will change, no matter how many people complain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will return your daughter soon, so go home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will return your daughter soon, so go home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will return your daughter soon, so go home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not going anywhere until I see my daughter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not going anywhere until I see my daughter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not going anywhere until I see my daughter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she went into the research lab, she'll be in trouble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she went into the research lab, she'll be in trouble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she went into the research lab, she'll be in trouble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'll help!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'll help!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'll help!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You bought me bread, and... I think it'll be all right if I explain what happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You bought me bread, and... I think it'll be all right if I explain what happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You bought me bread, and... I think it'll be all right if I explain what happened.

records.m_Talk_DEU: E-even if I'll get hit a little...
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-even if I'll get hit a little...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... mister...? Will it be okay if I go and get the girl?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... mister...? Will it be okay if I go and get the girl?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... mister...? Will it be okay if I go and get the girl?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is she not ready yet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is she not ready yet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is she not ready yet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh? Eva and the two girls are given permission to enter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh? Eva and the two girls are given permission to enter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh? Eva and the two girls are given permission to enter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, well.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, well.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Get the girl quickly and leave the premises. You three may enter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get the girl quickly and leave the premises. You three may enter.

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Oh... I see...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>So the Kikimora we defeated that time was...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>So the Kikimora we defeated that time was...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>So the Kikimora we defeated that time was...</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I think it was me.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>When the Kikimora died, I felt at ease like I was falling asleep.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>When the Kikimora died, I felt at ease like I was falling asleep.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>When the Kikimora died, I felt at ease like I was falling asleep.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I think it was wandering around only looking for me.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>So that it could die with me.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>So that it could die with me.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>So that it could die with me.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Haha... What a comical life...</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Haha... What a comical life...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cheer up?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cheer up?

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I always smiled my way through hardship...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I always smiled my way through hardship...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I always smiled my way through hardship...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it's the only thing I know to do...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it's the only thing I know to do...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it's the only thing I know to do...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, I just wanted to comfort you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You idiot. I can never be mad at you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You idiot. I can never be mad at you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You idiot. I can never be mad at you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know what you just told me was from your heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know what you just told me was from your heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know what you just told me was from your heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, I'm a little relieved... to hear you being you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, I'm a little relieved... to hear you being you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, I'm a little relieved... to hear you being you.

root.m_Talk_DEU: So, thanks, Sasha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, thanks, Sasha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For sticking around ever since we first met.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For sticking around ever since we first met.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For sticking around ever since we first met.

root.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... Mavka!
root.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... Mavka!
root.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... Mavka!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I... want to say thank you to you, too...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I... want to say thank you to you, too...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: For being with me all this time, and watching the Town Soldiers of Bremen with me, and...
root.m_Talk_DEU: For being with me all this time, and watching the Town Soldiers of Bremen with me, and...
root.m_Talk_FRA: For being with me all this time, and watching the Town Soldiers of Bremen with me, and...

root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't have to say more. It's making me blush.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't have to say more. It's making me blush.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey... Can I sleep with you tonight?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey... Can I sleep with you tonight?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey... Can I sleep with you tonight?

root.m_Talk_DEU: R-really?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure! That's a great idea!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure! That's a great idea!

root.m_Talk_FRA: But... don't push me away while you talk in your sleep, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, okay.

root.m_Talk_DEU: The village people don't seem to be coming out of their houses these days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The village people don't seem to be coming out of their houses these days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think the atmosphere got worse after the Northern Army arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think the atmosphere got worse after the Northern Army arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think the atmosphere got worse after the Northern Army arrived.

root.m_Talk_DEU: They're taking tons of Eternium as payment for their protection against the Counterside Effect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're taking tons of Eternium as payment for their protection against the Counterside Effect.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka, let's lay low for the time being.

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I'm trying to get her some of the hobbies she used to enjoy long ago.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Not really... But she made it, and I feel bad to waste it...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I have to go through a thorough cleaning of my insides after eating it, if it makes Dreka happy, then...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Eww... This tastes horrible...!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... She's still learning and hasn't gotten the seasoning right...

root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's okay with you, can I have it back? Dreka likes to see me eat it.

root.m_Talk_DEU: A-am I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-am I?

root.m_Talk_DEU: B-but... Dreka's not a bad kid as you may think...
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-but... Dreka's not a bad kid as you may think...

root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sure it hurts her, too.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Last time in the lab, she hit me for stopping her from going on a rampage with the new weapon.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Not at all...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not at all...

root.m_Talk_DEU: You are not allowed to enter!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are not allowed to enter!

root.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am? What's wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am? What's wrong?

root.m_Talk_FRA: My daughter said she wanted to see the Northern Army and ran straight in there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh? Eva and the two girls are given permission to enter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh? Eva and the two girls are given permission to enter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh? Eva and the two girls are given permission to enter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get the girl quickly and leave the premises. You three may enter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get the girl quickly and leave the premises. You three may enter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get the girl quickly and leave the premises. You three may enter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, ma'am. We'll bring her back safe and sound.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, ma'am. We'll bring her back safe and sound.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, ma'am. We'll bring her back safe and sound.

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay. I'm counting on you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay. I'm counting on you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay. I'm counting on you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ehehe... Thanks, mister!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ehehe... Thanks, mister!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ehehe... Thanks, mister!
